name: Al Moammar Information Systems Company
description: Al Moammar Information Systems Company provides information technology solutions and services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It operates in seven segments: Business Service Management Unit, Solutions Unit, Systems Unit, Information Technology Security Unit, Networking Unit, Operation and Maintenance Unit, and Data Center Unit. It offers enterprise networking solutions, hybrid cloud and data center modernization, servers and storages, AI, Analytics, and high-performance computing, virtualizations and containerization, data protection and archiving solutions, collaboration and video conference solutions, load balancers solutions, mobility and wireless solutions, and transmission and optical network solutions; and data center and ELV services. The company also offers big data, data analytics, reporting, and integrations; ERP and content management solutions; industry-focused solutions; AI and machine learning; core banking solutions; GIS, fleet management, and FFMS; multi-cloud and digital transformation; and emerging technologies; operation and maintenance services; and cyber security services. In addition, it offers professional services, consultancy services, managed services, managed soc, PMO services, and training services. Further, the company provides medical devices and laboratory products, as well as operates tele-care and telemedicine centers, canteens or cafeterias, and storage of medical waste; and innovative technology solutions, as well as engages in developing leading-edge platforms; information and telecommunication solutions services, software deployment, other communication activities, computer programming activities, computer consulting expertise and facilities management activities, data processing, and web hosting and related activities; and home solution. The company was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
